name: sui-pilot
description: Doc-first Sui, Move, Walrus, Seal, TypeScript SDK, and Sui Prover development support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Doc-first Sui Move development, review, and verification.
interface.longDescription: Sui Pilot gives Codex current, local Sui-stack context: bundled Sui, Move Book, Walrus, Seal, TypeScript SDK, and Sui Prover docs; Move code-quality and security-review workflows; arithmetic guidance; and optional formal-verification flows backed by Move LSP and Sui Prover MCP servers.
defaultPrompt: Check this Move code for 2024 idioms
